case_title: BLODGETT INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ATLSFO LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-27-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-27-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
